---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for StellarFreight
labels: enhancement
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. e.g. I always have to manually check Stellar Explorer to verify my payment...

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Which area does this affect?**
- [ ] Frontend (UI / UX)
- [ ] Payment flow (Stellar / USDC / XLM)
- [ ] Soroban escrow contract
- [ ] Shipment tracking
- [ ] Admin dashboard
- [ ] API / Backend

**Additional context**
Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
